title: calophyllum membranaceum
intro: Calophyllum membranaceum, also known as Burut or Membranous Burut, is a species of tree in the family Calophyllaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calophyllum membranaceum are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make ointments, creams, and extracts that can be applied topically to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
